parsed.production_notes: The video exhibits clear signs of AI generation. The main character's face has an uncanny smoothness and unnatural micro-expressions, while background characters in the cafeteria move in repetitive, unnatural loops.

characters.appearance: Young adult female of South Asian descent, medium build, brown complexion. She has long, wavy dark hair, wears glasses, and has a nose ring.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue button-down shirt with subtle embroidery along the placket.

characters.appearance: Adult male, Caucasian, medium build. He has short brown hair and a clean-shaven face.
Humanoid robot from the chest up. It has a smooth, white, metallic face with blue eyes and a glowing blue circular light on its chest.

scenes.setting: Modern office cafeteria, daytime, bright lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long dark hair and glasses takes a selfie-style video. She is wearing a light blue embroidered shirt. She stands in a modern, brightly lit office cafeteria. Behind her, a counter is visible with two chefs in white uniforms preparing food. A man in a blue shirt walks past in the background. The woman looks directly at the camera with an expressive face. The lighting is even and natural.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman taking a selfie video in a busy cafeteria. Text overlays appear on screen as she speaks. The background features cafeteria staff and patrons.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: My colleagues don't know I've been practicing my English, and they were making fun of my accent.
Character A says: Let's see their reaction.
scenes.on_screen_text: My colleagues don't know I've been practicing my English, and they were making fun of my accent. Let's see their reaction. Learna AI.

scenes.setting: Office meeting room, daytime, glass walls.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits at a conference table in a modern office meeting room. She is speaking and gesturing with her hands. To her right, a male colleague in a plaid shirt leans in with an exaggerated expression of surprise. Other colleagues are seated around the table in the blurred background. The room has glass walls and recessed ceiling lights. The camera angle is slightly low, focusing on the woman.

scenes.visual_description: The scene cuts to a meeting room where the woman is speaking confidently. Her male colleague looks visibly shocked by her fluency. Text overlays display their dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project.
Character B says: What did you say?
Character A says: A different approach.
Character B says: Wow, you sound a lot different.
scenes.on_screen_text: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project. What did you say? A different approach. Wow, you sound a lot different. Learna AI.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits at a conference table in a modern office meeting room. She holds up a black smartphone, displaying its blank screen to the camera. She looks directly at the lens while speaking. A male colleague in a plaid shirt is visible in the background, looking towards her. The room features glass walls and recessed lighting. The camera angle is slightly low.

scenes.visual_description: Still in the meeting room, the woman turns to the camera to explain her secret. She holds up her phone to introduce the app. Text overlays accompany her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Remember I was always on my phone after lunch?
Character A says: I wasn't scrolling Instagram, I was practicing English with this.
Character A says: It's called Learna.
Character A says: It's like having an English teacher on your phone.
Character A says: Look, let me show you.
scenes.on_screen_text: Remember I was always on my phone after lunch? I wasn't scrolling Instagram, I was practicing English with this. It's called Learna. It's like having an English teacher on your phone. Look, let me show you. Learna AI.

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed vertically in the center of the frame. The screen shows a digital interface with various colorful icons and profile pictures of different people. The background behind the phone is a blurred, indistinct room setting. The lighting is bright and even. The composition focuses entirely on the device.

A white, humanoid robot is shown from the chest up. It has a smooth, metallic face with blue eyes and a glowing blue circular light on its chest. The robot faces forward with a neutral expression. The lighting highlights the contours of its metallic surface.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of the app interface is shown on a phone screen. An animated robot avatar appears as an inset, speaking to the viewer. Text overlays highlight the app's features.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Wait.
Character C says: Did you know you can speak English like a native in just one week?
Character C says: It's not magic, it's Learna, the app that corrects you as you speak and teaches you without you even noticing.
Character C says: Let's try it together.
scenes.on_screen_text: Wait. Did you know you can speak English like a native in just one week? It's not magic, it's Learna, the app that corrects you as you speak and teaches you without you even noticing. Let's try it together. Learna AI. SPEAK ENGLISH LIKE A NATIVE IN JUST 1 WEEK!

panels.panel_visual_description: A white, humanoid robot is shown from the chest up. It has a smooth, metallic face with blue eyes and a glowing blue circular light on its chest. The background is black with faint, concentric white circles radiating outwards. The robot faces forward with a neutral expression. The lighting is focused on the robot, creating a stark contrast with the dark background.

A young woman with long dark hair and glasses takes a selfie-style video. She is wearing a light blue embroidered shirt. She stands in a modern, brightly lit office cafeteria. Behind her, a counter is visible with chefs in white uniforms and people walking by. The woman looks directly at the camera with an engaged expression. The lighting is natural and even.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half shows the robot avatar, while the bottom half shows the woman in the cafeteria. They engage in a simulated conversation practice session. Text overlays display their dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Do you speak English?
Character A says: A little bit.
Character C says: Where do you live?
Character A says: I am London.
Character C says: Almost.
Character C says: You should say, I live in London.
Character A says: I always mix that up.
Character C says: That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly.
Character A says: But I don't have any money.
Character C says: You don't need money.
Character C says: With Learna, you can practice English for free.
Character C says: It is not like other expensive apps or courses.
Character A says: Are you serious?
Character C says: Absolutely.
Character C says: No tricks, just real conversation practice with your AI tutor.
Character A says: Like, a real tutor?
Character C says: Yes.
Character C says: I correct your grammar, your pronunciation, and help you speak with confidence.
Character A says: Okay.
Character A says: I am going to download Learna right now.
Character C says: Great decision.
Character C says: Let's speak English together.

That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly. But I don't have any money. You don't need money. With Learna, you can practice English for free. It is not like other expensive apps or courses. Are you serious? Absolutely. No tricks, just real conversation practice with your AI tutor. Like, a real tutor? Yes. I correct your grammar, your pronunciation, and help you speak with confidence. Okay. I am going to download Learna right now. Great decision. Let's speak English together. Learna AI.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid dark blue background fills the entire frame. In the center is a square graphic featuring the head and shoulders of a white, humanoid robot with blue eyes. The robot has a smooth, metallic appearance. The composition is simple and central. The lighting on the robot graphic is even, highlighting its features against the dark background.

scenes.visual_description: A static end card displays the app's icon and call-to-action text. App store badges are visible at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Download now and start practicing.
scenes.on_screen_text: DOWNLOAD NOW! START PRACTICING. Learna. Download on the App Store. GET IT ON Google Play.
